display.purpose: Section hero headings. One per page section maximum. text-wrap: balance always.

title.purpose: Card headings, modal titles, section subheadings.

body.purpose: All prose and UI copy. Max 65ch line length.

label.purpose: Status pills, phase tags, nav labels, data unit labels. Always uppercase.

shadows.name: lift-xs
shadows.purpose: Subtle separation for chips, badges, small interactive elements.

shadows.name: lift-sm
shadows.purpose: Default card and panel elevation at rest.

shadows.name: lift-md
shadows.purpose: Hovered/focused card states; bottom nav bar.

shadows.name: primary-glow
shadows.purpose: Primary CTA buttons only. Not reused on cards.

motion.name: spring-snap
motion.purpose: Mobile nav pill snap-to-slot on drag release.

motion.name: spring-icon
motion.purpose: Nav icon scale + lift on active.

motion.name: transition-state
motion.purpose: Button color, border, opacity state changes.

motion.name: transition-lift
motion.purpose: Button hover lift (slight spring). Only use on transform, never on layout props.

breakpoints.name: mobile
breakpoints.notes: Bottom nav switches on; top nav links hidden.

breakpoints.name: tablet
breakpoints.notes: Grid columns collapse; auth card goes single-column.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single high-conviction action on any screen. Cobalt gradient, pill shape.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; padding: 13px 24px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #2F8CFF 0%, #1E6BFF 100%); color: #ffffff; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-weight: 800; font-size: 14px; border-radius: 999px; box-shadow: 0 4px 28px rgba(59,125,216,0.38); border: 1px solid rgba(96,165,250,0.35); cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1), box-shadow 0.2s, background 0.18s; letter-spacing: -0.01em; white-space: nowrap; position: relative; overflow: hidden; } .ds-btn-primary::after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.12) 0%, transparent 60%); border-radius: inherit; pointer-events: none; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #4A9FFF 0%, #2F8CFF 100%); transform: translateY(-2px) scale(1.02); box-shadow: 0 8px 40px rgba(59,125,216,0.30), 0 2px 12px rgba(59,125,216,0.18); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0) scale(0.99); box-shadow: 0 4px 28px rgba(59,125,216,0.38); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #3B7DD8; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Supporting actions. Glass background, cobalt-tinted border.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; padding: 11px 20px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.68); border: 1.5px solid rgba(60,120,200,0.38); color: #243550; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px; border-radius: 999px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.18s, border-color 0.18s, transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #DCECFb; border-color: rgba(60,120,200,0.38); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #3B7DD8; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { padding: 9px 16px; background: transparent; border: 1.5px solid rgba(70,130,205,0.25); color: #6080A0; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; border-radius: 999px; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.18s, color 0.18s, background 0.18s; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: rgba(60,120,200,0.38); color: #243550; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.68); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #3B7DD8; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Text Button
components.description: Inline links like 'Create account' or 'Forgot password'.
components.css: .ds-btn-text { background: transparent; color: #3B7DD8; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; padding: 8px 4px; border: none; border-bottom: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.18s, opacity 0.18s, text-shadow 0.18s; text-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(47,140,255,0.30); } .ds-btn-text:hover { border-bottom-color: rgba(47,140,255,0.50); opacity: 0.85; } .ds-btn-text:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #3B7DD8; outline-offset: 2px; border-radius: 2px; }

components.name: Glass Card
components.description: Primary content container. Frosted glass with specular edge and cobalt bottom glow.
components.html:
Recovery Score

You're on track for return to sport by Week 6.
components.css: .ds-glass-card { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.60); border: 1px solid rgba(47,140,255,0.18); border-radius: 22px; padding: 22px; box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(40,90,180,0.13); backdrop-filter: blur(20px) saturate(1.8); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(20px) saturate(1.8); position: relative; overflow: visible; } .ds-glass-card::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 10%; right: 10%; height: 1px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 0%, rgba(96,165,250,0.35) 50%, transparent 100%); pointer-events: none; } .ds-glass-card::after { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: -50px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); width: 80%; height: 100px; background: radial-gradient(ellipse at center, rgba(47,140,255,0.22) 0%, transparent 70%); pointer-events: none; border-radius: 50%; } .ds-glass-card__title { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 22px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.04em; color: #0F1B2E; margin: 0 0 8px; } .ds-glass-card__body { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.6; color: #3D5878; margin: 0; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard form input. White glass background with cobalt focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input-wrap { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; } .ds-input-label { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: #3D5878; letter-spacing: 0.01em; } .ds-input { width: 100%; height: 46px; padding: 0 14px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.80); border: 1px solid rgba(180,210,250,0.50); border-radius: 16px; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; color: #0F1B2E; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.18s, box-shadow 0.18s; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #6080A0; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #3B7DD8; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(59,125,216,0.10); }

components.name: Phase Chip
components.description: Recovery phase tag — color-coded to the five rehab phases.
components.html: ProtectRestoreCapacity
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 999px; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.10em; text-transform: uppercase; gap: 5px; } .ds-chip--protect  { background: rgba(74,143,212,0.12);  color: #4A8FD4; border: 1px solid rgba(74,143,212,0.25);  } .ds-chip--restore  { background: rgba(24,160,90,0.12);   color: #18A05A; border: 1px solid rgba(24,160,90,0.25);   } .ds-chip--capacity { background: rgba(124,111,212,0.12); color: #7C6FD4; border: 1px solid rgba(124,111,212,0.25); } .ds-chip--speed    { background: rgba(232,160,32,0.12);  color: #E8A020; border: 1px solid rgba(232,160,32,0.25);  } .ds-chip--return   { background: rgba(59,125,216,0.12);  color: #3B7DD8; border: 1px solid rgba(59,125,216,0.25);  }

components.name: Desktop Nav Link
components.description: Top navigation link with sliding active-pill indicator.
components.html: HomeAssessmentPlan
components.css: .ds-nav-top { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; position: relative; } .ds-nav-link { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: #6080A0; padding: 7px 14px; border-radius: 999px; text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.18s, background 0.18s; position: relative; z-index: 1; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #243550; background: rgba(59,125,216,0.06); } .ds-nav-link--active { color: #3B7DD8; font-weight: 700; } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #3B7DD8; outline-offset: 2px; }

narrative.overview:
InjuryGuide occupies the precise midpoint between medical precision and athletic confidence. The interface is a well-lit consultation room, not a hospital ward — crisp white-frosted glass surfaces float over a cool misty-blue background, carrying information with authority and calm. Every element earns its opacity: surfaces that carry primary actions are more solid; contextual layers are more translucent, creating a natural depth hierarchy without artificial drama.

The aesthetic is purposefully light — a soft #EEF6FF canvas threaded with concentric cobalt rings, like the surface of still water. Against this, frosted-glass cards read as elevated, clinical documents. The cobalt blue (#3B7DD8) is the single voice of urgency and progress; it appears on CTAs, active states, and the anatomy selector — never decoratively. Motion is measured: spring-snapping, not bouncing; fading in, not flying in.

This system explicitly rejects two failure modes: it does not feel like an NHS hospital portal (sterile bureaucratic blue-on-white forms, zero personality) and it does not feel like a meditation app (soft pastels, organic blobs, slow ambient vibes).
keyCharacteristics: Light frosted-glass surfaces on a misty-blue canvas
Single cobalt accent; all other colors are semantic (green = heal, amber = caution, red = stop)
Space Grotesk headings with aggressive negative tracking; Inter body for legibility
Spring physics for all interactive motion; no bouncing, no elastic
Glass is structural, not decorative — applied only where hierarchy demands it

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Recovery Cobalt (#3B7DD8) is used on ≤15% of any screen. Its rarity is the point — when it appears, the user knows to act.

rules.name: The Semantic Color Rule
rules.body: Green means healed. Amber means cautious. Red means stop. Purple means capacity. These colors are never used decoratively.

rules.name: The Tight-Head Rule
rules.body: Display and Title headings carry negative letter-spacing (-0.04em to -0.06em). Any heading with tracking ≥ 0 reads as amateur on this system.

rules.name: The Legibility Floor Rule
rules.body: Body text is never lighter than #6080A0 (--muted) on any canvas. Muted gray for elegance is the #1 reason clinical UIs become unreadable.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Primary Glow shadow appears only on primary buttons, never on cards or panels.

rules.name: The Blur Budget Rule
rules.body: backdrop-filter: blur(20px) is the standard. Never omit -webkit-backdrop-filter. Never go below 12px (loses the frosted effect).

dos: Do use Recovery Cobalt (#3B7DD8) as the single interactive accent — on buttons, active nav, focus rings, and the anatomy selector only.
Do apply the top specular edge (::before gradient) to every glass card.
Do use Space Grotesk at 700–800 weight with negative tracking (≥ -0.04em) for all headings.
Do use semantic colors for health signals: green = healed/complete, amber = caution, red = stop/contraindicated.
Do animate with spring physics — stiffness 400–560, damping 28–36.
Do ensure placeholder text uses #6080A0 or darker (4.5:1 contrast minimum).
Do add @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) alternates for every animation.
donts: Don't make the interface feel like a generic NHS / hospital portal — no sterile bureaucratic blue-on-white grids.
Don't make the interface feel like a meditation or wellness app — no soft pastels, no organic blob shapes.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text). Use solid color for emphasis.
Don't apply glass cards by default to every container. Glass is purposeful.
Don't nest cards inside cards. Always wrong.
Don't use the phase colors (green, amber, purple, red) outside their semantic phase-tagging context.
Don't drop body text below #6080A0 on any light surface.
Don't use arbitrary z-index values (999, 9999). Use the semantic scale: 10→20→30→40→50→60→70.
Don't animate layout CSS properties (width, height, top, left) for interactive feedback.
